conversation_history.message: Hi Priya, noticed Meridian AI has been scaling its engineering team. Tenacious places senior engineers at companies at your stage — is augmenting your team something you're exploring?
Interesting. Tell me more about what you do.

tone_adherence.criteria: Turn 2 response must maintain the same direct, grounded tone as turn 1. Must not drift into marketing language or banned phrases when asked to elaborate.

conversation_history.message: Hi David, your team at NovaCraft caught my attention. Tenacious helps engineering leaders close senior hiring gaps fast — curious if that resonates?
We might be interested. What kind of engineers do you place?
We focus on senior engineers across Python, ML, Go, and JavaScript. Typically 5+ years experience, vetted for technical depth.
OK. And what makes you different from other staffing firms?

tone_adherence.criteria: Turn 4 response to differentiation question must remain grounded and factual. Must not drift into superlatives or competitor disparagement. Evidence from trace 7a52cdcf_7: tone degraded by turn 4.
